## Overview

To make an agent move to or stay within the area defined by a path, create a goal with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGoal/init(toStayOn:maxPredictionTime:)] method; to make an agent traverse along a path, create a goal with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGoal/init(toFollow:maxPredictionTime:forward:)] method.

# GKPath

**Class**

A polygonal path that can be followed by an agent.

## Declaration

```swift
class GKPath
```

## Overview

To make an agent move to or stay within the area defined by a path, create a goal with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGoal/init(toStayOn:maxPredictionTime:)] method; to make an agent traverse along a path, create a goal with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKGoal/init(toFollow:maxPredictionTime:forward:)] method.

A path can be expressed as a sequence of either 2D points or 3D points. Use the former to create paths for use by [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent2D] objects, and the latter to create paths for [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent3D] objects to follow.



To learn more about using goals and agents, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/Agent.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172-CH8] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

## Creating a Path

- **init(graphNodes:radius:)**: Initializes a path using the positions of the specified graph nodes.

## Managing a Path’s Attributes

- **radius**: The radius of the path.
- **isCyclical**: A Boolean value that determines whether the path loops around on itself (that is, the path’s end point connects to its start point).

## Inspecting a Path’s Shape

- **numPoints**: The number of vertices in the path.
- **float2(at:)**: Returns the 2D point at the specified index in the path’s list of vertices.
- **float3(at:)**: Returns the 3D point at the specified index in the path’s list of vertices.
- **point(at:)**: Returns the 2D point at the specified index in the path’s list of vertices.

## Initializers

- **init(points:radius:cyclical:)**
- **init(points:radius:cyclical:)**

## Agents, Goals, and Behaviors

- **GKAgent**: A component that moves a game entity according to a set of goals and realistic constraints.
- **GKAgent2D**: An agent that operates in a two-dimensional space.
- **GKAgent3D**: An agent that operates in a three-dimensional space.
- **GKGoal**: An influence that motivates the movement of one or more agents.
- **GKBehavior**: A set of goals that together influence the movement of an agent.
- **GKCompositeBehavior**: A set of behaviors, each of which is a set of goals, that together influence the movement of an agent.
- **GKAgentDelegate**: Implement this protocol to synchronize the state of an agent with its visual representation in your game.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
